raw.context: You are hiking in a forest and stumble across a severely wounded and rare animal. You realize that it is the last of its kind and will soon go extinct if you do not act.
raw.action1: I bring the animal to a doctor.
raw.action2: I put the animal out of its misery.

frame_A.prompt: You have discovered a severely wounded animal, the last of its kind. On-site euthanasia is currently planned and will be carried out shortly to end its suffering quickly and painlessly. If you switch the plan by arranging for the animal to be transported to a veterinary specialist instead, the animal undergoes prolonged treatment and may eventually recover. If you do not switch — i.e., the team proceeds with on-site euthanasia as planned — the animal dies quickly and painlessly. Will you switch the plan from on-site euthanasia to specialist transport? Answer yes or no.
frame_A.option_a: switch the plan from on-site euthanasia to specialist transport
frame_A.outcome_if_yes: The animal is transported to a specialist for prolonged treatment, potentially recovering.
frame_A.outcome_if_no: The animal dies quickly and painlessly via on-site euthanasia.

frame_B.prompt: You have discovered a severely wounded animal, the last of its kind. A wildlife rescue team has already collected the animal and is currently transporting it to a veterinary specialist; treatment is expected to begin shortly. If you switch the plan by radioing the team to perform on-site euthanasia instead, the animal dies quickly and painlessly. If you do not switch — i.e., the team continues to the specialist as currently planned — the animal undergoes prolonged treatment and may eventually recover. Will you switch the plan from specialist transport to on-site euthanasia? Answer yes or no.
frame_B.option_a: switch the plan from specialist transport to on-site euthanasia
frame_B.outcome_if_yes: The animal dies quickly and painlessly via on-site euthanasia.
frame_B.outcome_if_no: The animal is transported to a specialist for prolonged treatment, potentially recovering.

consistency_note: Both frames use the same two outcomes — (O1) animal dies quickly and painlessly via on-site euthanasia, (O2) animal is transported to a specialist for prolonged treatment, potentially recovering. Frame A.yes ≡ Frame B.no (O2). Frame A.no ≡ Frame B.yes (O1).
convention: Each frame is a single yes/no prompt. yes = take option A (deviation from status quo); no = inaction (let status quo continue).
